problem_statement: Login fails to authenticate a user with a password: the session token is never issued.
patch:
diff --git a/auth.py b/auth.py
--- a/auth.py
+++ b/auth.py
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-def login(username, password):
+def login(username, password):
     token = _issue_token(username)
     return token
